meanings.definition: dash violently or with great speed or impetuosity

examples: He launched into a long diatribe
She plunged into a dangerous adventure
The professor plunged his students into the study of the Italian text
It plunged to the bottom of the well

meanings.definition: immerse briefly into a liquid so as to wet, coat, or saturate
examples: dip the garment into the cleaning solution
dip the brush into the paint
He immersed himself into his studies
